title: Help, only one thing holding me back - can you group records like in Airtable?
excerpt: Hello, new user here and excited to be able to join Monday.com’s ecosystem. Had a crucial question though - can you group records by another column, like in Airtable? We use the grouping feature A LOT in Airtable, for ma…

posts.author: JarvisDigital (Jarvis Digital)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, new user here and excited to be able to join Monday.com’s ecosystem. Had a crucial question though - can you group records by another column, like in Airtable? We use the grouping feature A LOT in Airtable, for managing our workflow to reporting, so without this it will be impossible to bring over our work to Monday.com

Here’s a GIF of what I mean:
https://support.airtable.com/hc/en-us/article_attachments/210742407/groupByXL.gif

And an article explaining this feature: Guide to Grouped Records | Airtable Support

Would really appreciate someone’s input here

posts.author: JarvisDigital (Jarvis Digital)
posts.cookedHtml: Any help from the admins would be very much appreciated

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
Maybe I am wrong but there is an exact function which replicates Airtable’s Group.

You can achieve part of this function with a status column and multi groups. Example, option for status to be Great Britain, Germany, France. Now create three new groups with the same name. Use an automation, when Status=Germany’s, move item to Group=Germany.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @JarvisDigital, good question! There are different solutions based on what you are looking to do with this functionality Like @abiciea mentioned, you could automate this process to sort into groups based on status change triggers. I’d also recommend checking out our new pivot table view if you haven’t already!: Pivot Board View

posts.author: vibusd (Vibus Dekaa)
posts.cookedHtml: Except the Pivot table view is only for Enterprise accounts, so that’s a no-go for the majority of your customers I’m sure :-/

posts.author: Eperkins (Elizabeth Perkins)
posts.cookedHtml: I really, really wish Monday.com could do this. We switched from Airtable and I miss this functionality so much! It made reporting so easy!
